blunders.title: Comment tags instead of directives
blunders.symptom: Plugin loads but never appears in instrument list, no sound
blunders.root_cause: //tags: is a comment, not a directive. Must be tags: without //

blunders.title: Missing pin declarations
blunders.symptom: Plugin accepts MIDI but produces zero audio, meters show nothing
blunders.root_cause: Without in_pin:none / out_pin:Left / out_pin:Right, REAPER defaults to audio effect mode
blunders.fix: Add in_pin:none, out_pin:Left, out_pin:Right to all instrument JSFX

blunders.title: Unicode in JSFX source
blunders.symptom: Plugin appears in FX list but produces no audio, no compilation error
blunders.root_cause: REAPER JSFX compiler on Windows (cp1252) silently fails on Unicode
blunders.fix: ASCII only in all JSFX files. No em-dashes, arrows, or special characters

blunders.title: REAPER JSFX cache
blunders.symptom: Fixed code still doesn't work, old broken behavior persists
blunders.root_cause: REAPER caches compiled JSFX bytecode. Editing source doesn't invalidate cache
blunders.fix: Rename the file to force cache miss

blunders.title: XOR operator confusion
blunders.symptom: Noise LFSR produces incorrect patterns, distorted sound
blunders.root_cause: In JSFX, ^ is exponentiation (power), not XOR. 0^0=1 not 0

blunders.title: DC offset in mixer
blunders.symptom: Meters show constant -2.1dB even when silent, audio inaudible or distorted
blunders.root_cause: Hardware-accurate NES mixer formula produces DC bias at rest

blunders.title: Unrecognized RPP tokens
blunders.symptom: Project loads with 5+ warnings, settings silently ignored
blunders.root_cause: MASTER_SEND, REC_INPUT, RECINPUT, RECMON don't exist in REAPER v7.27
blunders.fix: Use only tokens from a known-good saved project. See specs/rpp_fields.json

blunders.title: REC field MIDI input routing
blunders.symptom: MIDI input shows '(not connec...)' in track, keyboard doesn't work
blunders.root_cause: Wrong REC field encoding. Must be REC {0|1} 5088 1 0 0 0 0 0
blunders.fix: ALWAYS use 5088 even on unarmed tracks. Never use 0 for input field

blunders.title: SOURCE MIDIPOOL doesn't play back
blunders.symptom: MIDI items appear visually in timeline but pressing Play produces no audio
blunders.root_cause: REAPER v7 treats MIDIPOOL FILE as stubs, not playable items
blunders.fix: Use SOURCE MIDI with FILE reference, not SOURCE MIDIPOOL

blunders.title: Slider parameter misalignment
blunders.symptom: Plugin silent or wrong sounds when loaded from RPP
blunders.root_cause: Gap in slider numbering. RPP passes positional values that misalign
blunders.fix: Sequential slider numbering with no gaps. Pad to 64 with dashes

blunders.title: Every track plays every channel
blunders.symptom: Music plays 4x simultaneously, thick muddy noisy sound
blunders.root_cause: Each track runs full APU processing all 4 oscillators
blunders.fix: Channel Mode slider: each track set to its own mode (0=P1, 1=P2, 2=Tri, 3=Noise)

blunders.title: Community MIDI random channel numbers
blunders.symptom: Tracks mapped to wrong oscillators, missing or doubled parts
blunders.root_cause: Fan transcriptions use arbitrary channel layout, not NES standard 0-3
blunders.fix: Auto-remap MIDI channels based on analysis (pitch/role sorting)

blunders.title: Drums had no envelope
blunders.symptom: Drum hits sound like popping artifacts, no attack/decay character
blunders.root_cause: Noise channel just toggled on/off with no volume shaping
blunders.fix: Drum mapping table: GM note -> NES noise period + mode + volume + decay rate

blunders.title: Console synth ignores CC11/CC12
blunders.symptom: File playback uses generic ADSR instead of ground-truth per-frame envelopes. Notes sound wrong, missing articulation
blunders.root_cause: ReapNES_Console.jsfx has ADSR but no CC11/CC12 handlers in @block
blunders.fix: Port lp_cc_active[] system from ReapNES_APU.jsfx. When CC arrives, bypass ADSR

blunders.title: Mixer formula broken at partial volumes (B06 derivative)
blunders.symptom: Pulse channels nearly silent at vol=8, drums phase-invert during decay. Mario sounds thin with no body, drums flat
blunders.root_cause: B06 DC-offset formula (out/15 - 0.5) assumes full 0-15 range. At vol=8: output is 0.033 (15x too quiet). At vol<7.5: output goes NEGATIVE (phase inverts). Drum decay crosses zero mid-envelope
blunders.fix: Symmetric binary centering: (2*out - peak_vol) / 30. Pulse/noise swing +/-vol/30 regardless of volume level. Triangle keeps (out/15 - 0.5) since it sweeps full 0-15 range

blunders.title: Minimal RPP header breaks keyboard
blunders.symptom: Project opens but keyboard input silently fails
blunders.root_cause: Missing ENVATTACH, SAMPLERATE, METRONOME, etc. from RPP header
blunders.fix: Use full ~100 line header from Console_Test.rpp reference

blunders.title: REC 0 on unarmed tracks forgets MIDI routing
blunders.symptom: User arms track later, gets audio input instead of MIDI
blunders.root_cause: REC 0 0 1 0 0 0 0 0 sets input=0 which REAPER interprets as 'no input configured'
blunders.fix: ALWAYS use REC {0|1} 5088 1 0 0 0 0 0. Keep 5088 even when not armed
